name: Navarattan Curry
recipeIngredient: 4 cups assorted vegetables (e.g., broccoli, green peppers, carrots, cauliflower, or green beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the assorted vegetables, you can use any combination of broccoli, green peppers, carrots, cauliflower, or green beans.
2. Boil the vegetables (excluding onions and peas) until tender. Drain and set aside.
3. Melt butter in a pan and sauté onions and garlic until fragrant.
4. Add tomatoes, yogurt, and dry masala to the pan. Simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Add the cooked vegetables and simmer for another 5 minutes.
6. Pour in water as needed and cover. Simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Stir in heavy cream and green peas until heated through.
8. Just before serving, garnish with raisins and blanched almonds.
